title: koanophyllon scabriusculum
intro: Koanophyllon scabriusculum, also known as the rough-leaved koanophyllon, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Koanophyllon scabriusculum include its potential to reduce inflammation and treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Koanophyllon scabriusculum are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in the form of capsules or tinctures.
